solution: ```class Solution:
    def countDigitOne(self, n: int) -> int:
        if n < 1:
            return 0
        count = 0
        i = 1
        while i <= n:
            divider = i * 10
            count += (n // divider) * i + min(max(n % divider - i + 1, 0), i)
            i *= 10
        return count
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Iterate over each digit position, compute how many times digit 1 appears at that position across all numbers ≤ n using arithmetic grouping. Each position processed once, constant space, minimal CPU usage.
